title: Finding the forbidden Word
lines: You land in the bottom of the ride with a sickening splash, the black ichor clinging to your skin like tar.
Your fingers brush against something cold and solid in the sludge. It's a heavy tome, bound in what looks like human skin.
The symbols on the cover pulsate with a dark energy, and just looking at it makes your head ache.
You have found a fragment of the Necronomicon. The power of the word is yours, but it has a terrible price.

options.desc: 1. Escape the waterpark with your prize
